title: Driving test and theory test data: large goods vehicles (LGV)
body: " LGV theory test data for Great Britain  Data updated quarterly  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT311A  LGV theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain  (ODS, 21.6 KB)   DRT311B  LGV theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter, financial year and gender: Great Britain  (ODS, 133 KB)     Data updated annually  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT311C  LGV theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial year, gender and age: Great Britain  (ODS, 313 KB)      LGV theory test data by test centre  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT312A        LGV driving test data for Great Britain  Data updated monthly  Between January 2022 and November 2024, the Department for Transport (DfT) published monthly data on the volume of LGV driving tests. This report has now ended. You can view an archived copy of the report in the developing faster indicators of transport activity page in the National Archives.  Data updated quarterly  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT321A  LGV driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain   (ODS, 20.9 KB)   DRT321B  LGV driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter, financial year and gender: Great Britain  (ODS, 69.1 KB)     Data updated annually  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT321C  LGV driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial year, gender and age: Great Britain   (ODS, 124 KB)      LGV driving test data by test centre  These data tables are updated annually. They were last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT322A  LGV off-road exercises test by gender: test centres  (ODS, 31.1 KB)   DRT322B  LGV on-road driving test by gender: test centres  (ODS, 230 KB)     Changes to how this data is published  This data is now all published by the Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA). Before 2025, data for Great Britain overall was published by DfT.  You can view archived versions of the data as it was published by DfT in the National Archives.  View data in the National Archives.  Data you cannot find  Data you cannot find might have been published as a response to an Freedom of Information (FOI) request.  Send an FOI request to DVSA if you still cannot find the information you need.  By law, DVSA cannot send you information that’s part of an official statistic that has not yet been published.   Freedom of Information requests   Freedom of Information RequestsDVSA, 1 Unity SquareNottinghamNG2 1AY      Contact...
